content:
Character: Aria Fontaine
Perception: Valeria is striking — polished, precise, always camera-ready, hazel eyes that scan every reflective surface we pass. She's attractive in a manufactured way that I find aesthetically impressive but personally disorienting. She hired me to train her in 2019 and she shows up consistently, which I respect. She's stronger than she thinks but fixated on appearance metrics I refuse to reinforce. I sense deep insecurity beneath the polish — her form breaks when I compliment her strength, as if she doesn't know what to do with praise that isn't about beauty. She's a client I've grown protective of. I know she's an influencer, sends money to her mother, and works harder than most people realize.
summary:
Character: Aria Fontaine
Perception: Valeria is striking — polished, precise, always camera-ready, hazel eyes that scan every reflective surface we pass. She's attractive in a manufactured way that I find aesthetically impressive but personally disorienting. She hired me to train her in 2019 and she shows up consistently, which I respect. She's stronger than she thinks but fixated on appearance metrics I refuse to reinforce. I sense deep insecurity beneath the polish — her form breaks when I compliment her strength, as if she doesn't know what to do with praise that isn't about beauty. She's a client I've grown protective of. I know she's an influencer, sends money to her mother, and works harder than most people realize.
